title: Phase 10B: Purchasing module - service, API, vendor directory, RFQ, PO tracking
description: Build purchasing module backend and primary UI: purchasing service with RFQ, PO creation, three-way match, and vendor scorecards; API routes; vendor directory page; RFQ creation and comparison page; and PO creation and tracking page.
steps: Create src/lib/services/purchasing.service.ts with RFQ management, PO lifecycle, three-way match logic, vendor scoring
Create src/app/api/purchasing/match/route.ts with three-way match operations
Create src/app/(dashboard)/purchasing/rfqs/page.tsx with RFQ creation and side-by-side comparison
Create src/app/(dashboard)/purchasing/pos/page.tsx with PO creation and tracking
